zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle於大約1130年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir Fulco de Markham East26歲，母親Felice de Lizours19歲。他和Elizabeth de Nottingham至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1222年在他的家鄉享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle was born about 1130, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Fulco de Markham East, was 26 and his mother, Felice de Lizours, was 19. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth de Nottingham. He died about 1222, in his hometown, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle est né environ 1130, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Fulco de Markham East, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Felice de Lizours, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth de Nottingham. Il est décédé environ 1222, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castleが約1130年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Fulco de Markham Eastは26歳，母Felice de Lizoursは19歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Nottinghamとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1222年に故郷で94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Fulco de Markham East(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Felice de Lizours(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Nottingham(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1222년 그의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.
